app.title: Thumbnail Exporter
app.hero: Batch resize selected images, convert formats, compress them, and export them to an external folder.

banner.selectImages: Please select images in Eagle and then open this plugin.

settings.title: Output Settings
settings.groupBasicsHint: Choose the output format for the exported thumbnails.
settings.groupResizeHint: Adjust the resize ratio and output compression for the selected format.
settings.groupExportHint: Choose where converted files should go and control the prefix or suffix for exported files.
settings.languageHint: Auto follows the Eagle UI language.
settings.compressionLevelHint: Compression level for PNG. Higher values mean stronger compression.
settings.eagleFolderHint: Converted images will be imported into the selected Eagle folder.

list.title: Target Images
list.subtitleCount: {{count}} images are ready for batch processing.

empty.noSelection: Select images in Eagle to see them here.

messages.pluginInitInProgress: The plugin is still initializing. Please try again in a moment.
messages.noEagleFolders: No Eagle folders are available in this library.
messages.browseFailed: Failed to choose an output folder: {{message}}
messages.ffmpegInstallRequired: Install the FFmpeg Dependency Plugin and try again.
messages.runtimeUnavailable: Some features are unavailable outside the Eagle runtime.

validation.selectItems: Please select at least one image in Eagle.
validation.resizeRatioRange: The resize ratio must be between 10% and 100%.
validation.pngCompressionRange: PNG compression level must be between 0 and 9.
validation.renameTextLength: Rename text must be 80 characters or fewer.
validation.outputDirectoryAccess: The output folder cannot be accessed. Please choose an existing folder.
validation.eagleFolderUnavailable: The selected Eagle folder is no longer available. Please choose another folder.

dialogs.ffmpegMissingMessage: The FFmpeg Dependency Plugin is required for image conversion.
dialogs.ffmpegMissingDetail: Open the install screen, install it, and then try the conversion again.
